comments.author: derek
comments.text: Addressing 6 PR #368 findings: 1 CodeQL race condition, 1 unused import, 4 empty-except/documentation findings.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Implemented fixes for all PR #368 review findings: replaced TOCTTOU check in dashboard/scripts/patch-next-config.js with atomic write (flag 'wx' + EEXIST handling), removed unused import in scripts/test_pii_masking.py, and replaced/annotated empty except blocks in chat_runtime and cloudwatch_logger with explicit debug logging or explanatory comments. Validation: python3 -m py_compile on updated Python files, node -c on patch-next-config.js.
